channel.title: Project Sharing - Tag - DR's个人网页
channel.description: Project Sharing - Tag - DR's个人网页

item.title: YOLOv8 Phone Holder Detection Project
item.author: DR
item.description: In this article, I’ll share a complete object detection project using YOLOv8 - Phone Holder Detection. This project covers everything from dataset preparation and model training to inference deployment, demonstrating practical application of YOLOv8.
